parameters.query:
=SELECT Id, Name, OwnerId, Engagement_Status__c, CreatedDate
FROM Opportunity
WHERE Engagement_Status__c = 'Proposal Follow Up (7)'
AND IsClosed = false
ORDER BY LastModifiedDate ASC
LIMIT 100

nodes.name: Determine Proposal Follow Up 7 Sequence Step
Call W11 - Adjust Proposal Task Due Date
Apply W11 - Confirm Proposal Task Due

additionalFields.description:
={{ 'Action: ' + $json.taskAction + '

Guidelines: ' + $json.taskGuidelines + '

Opportunity: ' + $json.opportunityName + '
Sequence Step: ' + $json.stepKey + '
Workflow: W15O - Opportunity Proposal Follow Up 7-Day Task Sequence' }}
additionalFields.subject: ={{ $json.taskSubject }}

nodes.name: Call W11 - Next Proposal Follow-Up Date
Apply W11 - Set Next Proposal Follow-Up
